h1 标题 h2 标题 h3 标题 h4 标题 h5 标题 h6 标题 水平线 文本样式 This is bold text
This is bold text

列表 无序
Create a list by starting a line with +, -, or * Sub-lists are made by indenting 2 spaces: Marker character change forces new list start: Ac tristique libero volutpat at Facilisis in pretium nisl aliquet Nulla volutpat aliquam velit Very easy! 有序
Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet
Consectetur adipiscing elit
Integer molestie lorem at massa
You can use sequential numbers…
…or keep all the numbers as 1.
Start numbering with offset:
foo bar 代码 Inline code
Indented code
// Some comments line 1 of code line 2 of code line 3 of code Block code “fences”
1 Sample text here... Syntax highlighting
1 2 3 4 5 var foo = function (bar) { return bar++; }; console.log(foo(5));
